headline: NetApp Targets Hybrid Cloud Growth With New OpenShift Data Services
summary: NetApp (NasdaqGS:NTAP) has introduced new data management capabilities tailored for Red Hat OpenShift. The update focuses on resilience, scalability, and disaster recovery for hybrid and multicloud environments. Enterprise features include comprehensive backup, orchestrated disaster recovery-as-a-service, and consistent operations across cloud and on-premises infrastructure. For investors watching the rise of Kubernetes and containerized applications, this move ties directly into NetApp's...
